'''Vondruln''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer who formerly served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

While under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] at the [[Battle for Honor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Vondruln worked as an adviser to the admiral during his defection to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

Vondruln informed Harkov of the transfer of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] to the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. Possessing this information, Vondruln made arrangements for "an accident" to eliminate Stele, which precipitated the "Battle for Honor". Stele was able to evade the conspiracy to destroy him, fleeing to the safety of the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Osprey]]'' and the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order]], leading to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] discovery of Harkov's plot.

Afterwards, Admiral Harkov executed Vondruln for his failure to kill Stele.
